query:
INSERT INTO posts (title, slug, body, excerpt, pillar, readTime, published, createdAt) VALUES
('Where the Church Was Silent: A Reckoning With the History We Would Rather Not Own', 'where-church-was-silent', 'The church in America has a history that is not primarily the history of courage and faithfulness, though it contains that. It is, in significant stretches, a history of silence in the face of injustice — a silence that was often theological, often institutional, and almost always served the interests of the church''s own comfort and cultural position more than the interests of the people the silence abandoned.', 'The church in America has a history that is not primarily the history of courage and faithfulness. It is, in significant stretches, a history of silence in the face of injustice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Justice Is Not a Political Category: It Is a Theological One', 'justice-not-political-theological', 'Somewhere in the last several decades of American church life, a strange inversion occurred. The word "justice" — which appears hundreds of times in the Hebrew Bible, which is the specific word used to describe one of God''s most essential attributes, which the prophets announced and which Jesus inaugurated as the content of the kingdom — came to be heard in many evangelical contexts as a political term.', 'The word "justice" — which appears hundreds of times in the Hebrew Bible — came to be heard in many evangelical contexts as a political term. This inversion is theological error of the most significant kind.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Complicity Is Not Innocence: What Silence Costs the Witness', 'complicity-not-innocence', 'The comfortable Christian position in a culture with genuine injustice is neither endorsement nor active resistance. It is something more subtle and more convenient: the claim of non-involvement, the insistence that the church is above the political fray, the cultivation of a carefully maintained neutrality.', 'Silence in the face of injustice is not neutrality. It is a choice — and a choice with consequences that fall primarily on the people the injustice is targeting.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Poor Are Not a Ministry Category — They Are the Test of the Church', 'poor-not-ministry-category', 'The biblical position on the poor is not ambiguous. It is among the most consistently stated, most emphatically repeated, most specifically applied themes in the entire canon of Scripture — from the Mosaic law''s protections for the poor, the widow, the orphan, and the stranger.', 'The biblical position on the poor is not ambiguous. It is among the most consistently stated, most emphatically repeated themes in the entire canon of Scripture.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Creation Care Is Not Optional', 'creation-care-not-optional', 'The stewardship of creation is not an optional add-on to the gospel. It is central to what it means to bear the image of God and to participate in God''s redemptive work in the world. The earth is the Lord''s, and we are accountable for how we treat it.', 'The stewardship of creation is not an optional add-on to the gospel. It is central to what it means to bear the image of God and to participate in God''s redemptive work.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Widow, the Orphan, the Stranger', 'widow-orphan-stranger', 'These three figures appear together repeatedly in Scripture as the specific focus of God''s concern and the measure of the community''s faithfulness. They represent the vulnerable, the powerless, those without advocate or protection in the social order.', 'These three figures appear together repeatedly in Scripture as the specific focus of God''s concern and the measure of the community''s faithfulness.', 'Prophetic Justice', '5 min', true, NOW()),
('Mishpat and Tsedaqah', 'mishpat-tsedaqah', 'Two Hebrew words capture the fullness of biblical justice: mishpat (the establishment of right order) and tsedaqah (the restoration of right relationships). Together they describe the comprehensive vision of justice that runs through the prophetic tradition.', 'Two Hebrew words capture the fullness of biblical justice: mishpat (the establishment of right order) and tsedaqah (the restoration of right relationships).', 'Prophetic Justice', '5 min', true, NOW()),
('What Micah 6:8 Actually Demands', 'micah-6-8-demands', 'This verse is the distilled summary of what God requires. Not religious performance. Not institutional success. Not comfort or safety. Justice, mercy, and humility — lived out in the actual world with actual people.', '"He has shown you, O mortal, what is good. And what does the LORD require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God."', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Church Has a Credibility Problem', 'church-credibility-problem', 'The witness that survives is the witness willing to speak when speaking is costly. Everything else is brand management. The church known, among the people it claims to care about, for its silence when they needed its voice has sacrificed something very difficult to recover.', 'The church''s silence on justice has cost it something very difficult to recover: the credibility that comes from being genuinely trustworthy in the moments that matter.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Racial Reconciliation Without Repentance Is Just Branding', 'racial-reconciliation-without-repentance', 'Genuine reconciliation requires more than acknowledgment. It requires repentance — a turning away from the systems and patterns that created the injustice in the first place. Without that, reconciliation language becomes a marketing strategy rather than a theological reality.', 'Genuine reconciliation requires more than acknowledgment. It requires repentance — a turning away from the systems and patterns that created the injustice in the first place.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Prophetic Tradition on Economic Justice', 'prophetic-tradition-economic-justice', 'The prophets of Israel were not primarily social activists. They were messengers of God who announced, with extraordinary specificity, what God thought about the economic arrangements of the society. Their indictments of the wealthy and their advocacy for the poor are not peripheral to their message.', 'The prophets of Israel were not primarily social activists. They were messengers of God who announced, with extraordinary specificity, what God thought about the economic arrangements of the society.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Jubilee Means', 'what-jubilee-means', 'The Jubilee was God''s economic reset button — a radical vision of economic justice built into the law of Israel. Every fifty years, debts were forgiven, slaves were freed, and land was returned to its original owners. It was a theological statement about the limits of accumulation and the priority of liberation.', 'The Jubilee was God''s economic reset button — a radical vision of economic justice built into the law of Israel.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Stranger at the Gate', 'stranger-at-gate', 'The stranger appears in Scripture as a figure of particular concern — someone to be protected, provided for, and included in the community''s life. The law repeatedly commands: "Do not mistreat the stranger, for you were strangers in Egypt."', 'The stranger appears in Scripture as a figure of particular concern — someone to be protected, provided for, and included in the community''s life.', 'Prophetic Justice', '5 min', true, NOW()),
('Individual Sin Is Real — But So Is Systemic Sin', 'individual-sin-systemic-sin', 'The church often emphasizes personal morality while remaining blind to the systems that perpetuate injustice. Both are real, and both require attention. A person can be individually moral while participating in systems that are structurally unjust.', 'The church often emphasizes personal morality while remaining blind to the systems that perpetuate injustice. Both are real, and both require attention.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Poverty Is Political', 'why-poverty-political', 'Poverty is not primarily a personal failure. It is the result of political and economic systems that concentrate wealth and power in the hands of the few. Addressing it requires not just charity but justice — changes to the systems themselves.', 'Poverty is not primarily a personal failure. It is the result of political and economic systems that concentrate wealth and power in the hands of the few.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Church''s Wealth and the World''s Poverty', 'church-wealth-world-poverty', 'The contrast between the church''s resources and the world''s poverty is one of the most pressing ethical questions facing contemporary Christianity. How the church uses its wealth is a theological statement about what it believes and what it values.', 'The contrast between the church''s resources and the world''s poverty is one of the most pressing ethical questions facing contemporary Christianity.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Payday Lending Should Keep Christians Up at Night', 'payday-lending-christians', 'Payday lending is a system designed to extract wealth from the poor. The church''s silence on it is complicity with injustice. Interest rates that exceed 300% annually are not accidents. They are features of a system that preys on vulnerability.', 'Payday lending is a system designed to extract wealth from the poor. The church''s silence on it is complicity with injustice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Silence About Abuse in the Church', 'silence-abuse-church', 'The church''s institutional protection of abusers and silencing of victims is one of its most serious failures and most urgent moral crises. Justice requires not just individual accountability but systemic change in how the church handles power and protects the vulnerable.', 'The church''s institutional protection of abusers and silencing of victims is one of its most serious failures and most urgent moral crises.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Imago Dei Means More Than You Think', 'imago-dei-means-more', 'The image of God is not a spiritual abstraction. It is the foundation for human dignity and the basis for justice. Every person bears the image of God, and that image cannot be diminished by poverty, disability, race, or any other category.', 'The image of God is not a spiritual abstraction. It is the foundation for human dignity and the basis for justice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Good Samaritan Is Actually Arguing', 'good-samaritan-arguing', 'The parable of the Good Samaritan is not primarily about individual charity. It is a radical statement about who belongs to the community and who we are obligated to care for. It challenges the boundaries we draw and the people we exclude.', 'The parable of the Good Samaritan is not primarily about individual charity. It is a radical statement about who belongs to the community and who we are obligated to care for.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Solidarity Is a Theological Virtue', 'solidarity-theological-virtue', 'Solidarity is not just a political stance. It is a theological commitment to stand with the vulnerable and to work for their liberation. It is rooted in the God who stands with the oppressed and calls the church to do the same.', 'Solidarity is not just a political stance. It is a theological commitment to stand with the vulnerable and to work for their liberation.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Most Prophetic Thing You Can Do Is Live Differently', 'most-prophetic-live-differently', 'Prophetic witness is not primarily about words. It is about living in a way that demonstrates an alternative vision of what is possible. The way you spend your money, how you treat people, where you live, who you associate with — these are prophetic statements.', 'Prophetic witness is not primarily about words. It is about living in a way that demonstrates an alternative vision of what is possible.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Children in Poverty Are a Prophetic Indictment', 'children-poverty-prophetic-indictment', 'A society''s treatment of its poorest children is a measure of its moral character. The church that allows children to suffer in poverty has abandoned its prophetic calling. Jesus was explicit: "Let the little children come to me."', 'A society''s treatment of its poorest children is a measure of its moral character. The church that allows children to suffer in poverty has abandoned its prophetic calling.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Addressing Symptoms Without Causes Is Charity, Not Justice', 'symptoms-without-causes-charity', 'Charity addresses the immediate need. Justice addresses the system that created the need. Both are necessary, but only justice is transformative. The church that only practices charity while ignoring injustice is complicit with the systems that perpetuate suffering.', 'Charity addresses the immediate need. Justice addresses the system that created the need. Both are necessary, but only justice is transformative.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Church and Mental Health Justice', 'church-mental-health-justice', 'Mental health is not a personal failing. It is deeply connected to economic stress, trauma, and social conditions. Justice requires addressing these root causes. The church''s role is not just to pray for the mentally ill but to work for the conditions that promote mental health.', 'Mental health is not a personal failing. It is deeply connected to economic stress, trauma, and social conditions. Justice requires addressing these root causes.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Church Megaproject Budgets and the Widow''s Mite', 'church-megaproject-widows-mite', 'The contrast between massive church building projects and the widow''s sacrificial giving raises hard questions about what the church values and what it communicates about priorities. Jesus praised the widow''s mite precisely because it represented genuine sacrifice. What does our spending represent?', 'The contrast between massive church building projects and the widow''s sacrificial giving raises hard questions about what the church values and what it communicates about priorities.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('What Predominantly White Churches Get Wrong About Diversity', 'white-churches-diversity', 'Diversity is not a program to add to the church. It is a fundamental reorientation of how the church understands itself and its mission. Many white churches treat diversity as a problem to solve rather than a gift to receive and a justice imperative to embrace.', 'Diversity is not a program to add to the church. It is a fundamental reorientation of how the church understands itself and its mission.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Why "Reaching the Rich" Has Always Been More Comfortable', 'reaching-rich-comfortable', 'The church has historically prioritized reaching the wealthy because they have resources, power, and social standing. But Jesus prioritized the poor. This is not a minor difference. It shapes everything about what the church does and who it serves.', 'The church has historically prioritized reaching the wealthy because they have resources, power, and social standing. But Jesus prioritized the poor.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Theology of Repair', 'theology-of-repair', 'Justice is not just about stopping injustice. It is about repairing the damage that injustice has caused. This requires a theology of repair — a commitment to making things right, to restoration, to healing the wounds that injustice has inflicted.', 'Justice is not just about stopping injustice. It is about repairing the damage that injustice has caused. This requires a theology of repair.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('Hospitality Is Not Optional', 'hospitality-not-optional', 'Hospitality is a central biblical value and a practice of justice. It is the way we welcome the stranger and include the excluded. The church that practices genuine hospitality is making a prophetic statement about who belongs and who matters.', 'Hospitality is a central biblical value and a practice of justice. It is the way we welcome the stranger and include the excluded.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('Disability Justice Is a Theological Issue', 'disability-justice-theological', 'The inclusion and full participation of people with disabilities is not a program. It is a theological imperative rooted in the image of God. The church that excludes people with disabilities is denying the full humanity of those who bear God''s image.', 'The inclusion and full participation of people with disabilities is not a program. It is a theological imperative rooted in the image of God.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Earth Is the Lord''s', 'earth-is-lords', 'Creation care is not an optional concern for environmentalists. It is central to Christian theology and practice. The earth belongs to God, and we are accountable for how we treat it. Climate change is a justice issue because it disproportionately affects the poor.', 'Creation care is not an optional concern for environmentalists. It is central to Christian theology and practice. The earth belongs to God, and we are accountable for how we treat it.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Book of Ruth Says About Gleaning Laws', 'ruth-gleaning-laws', 'The gleaning laws of Israel were not charity. They were justice — a way of ensuring that the poor had access to the resources they needed to survive. The book of Ruth shows what this looks like in practice.', 'The gleaning laws of Israel were not charity. They were justice — a way of ensuring that the poor had access to the resources they needed to survive.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('Why the Church''s Comfort With Inequality Requires Explanation', 'church-comfort-inequality', 'The church''s acceptance of vast economic inequality is not neutral. It is a theological choice with theological consequences. It requires theological justification, and that justification is hard to find in Scripture.', 'The church''s acceptance of vast economic inequality is not neutral. It is a theological choice with theological consequences. It requires theological justification, and that justification is hard to find in Scripture.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Prophetic Pastor', 'prophetic-pastor', 'The pastor is called to be a prophetic voice — to name injustice, to challenge the powerful, to advocate for the vulnerable. This is not optional. It is central to the pastoral calling. The pastor who remains silent is not being neutral. He is complicit.', 'The pastor is called to be a prophetic voice — to name injustice, to challenge the powerful, to advocate for the vulnerable. This is not optional.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Justice Without Love Is Ideology', 'justice-without-love-ideology', 'Justice pursued without love becomes ideology. Love pursued without justice becomes sentimentality. The church needs both. The prophets combined fierce indictments of injustice with deep compassion for the vulnerable.', 'Justice pursued without love becomes ideology. Love pursued without justice becomes sentimentality. The church needs both.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Beatitudes Are Actually Promising', 'beatitudes-actually-promising', 'The Beatitudes are not spiritual abstractions. They are political statements about God''s preference for the poor and God''s vision of a transformed world. "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven."', 'The Beatitudes are not spiritual abstractions. They are political statements about God''s preference for the poor and God''s vision of a transformed world.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Black Church Has Been Doing Prophetic Justice for Centuries', 'black-church-prophetic-justice', 'The Black church has been a prophetic voice for justice in America for centuries. The white church has much to learn from this witness. The prophetic tradition is not an innovation. It is a recovery of something the Black church has always known.', 'The Black church has been a prophetic voice for justice in America for centuries. The white church has much to learn from this witness.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Color-Blindness Is Not a Theological Virtue', 'color-blindness-not-virtue', 'Color-blindness sounds virtuous but it is actually a way of denying the reality of racism and its ongoing effects. Justice requires seeing and naming racial injustice. The church that claims to be color-blind is blind to the suffering of people of color.', 'Color-blindness sounds virtuous but it is actually a way of denying the reality of racism and its ongoing effects. Justice requires seeing and naming racial injustice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Most Vulnerable People in Your City Are Not in Your Pews', 'vulnerable-people-not-in-pews', 'The most vulnerable people in your city — the homeless, the incarcerated, the undocumented — are not in your church. This is not an accident. It is a failure of the church to reach across the boundaries that divide us. Justice requires going to them.', 'The most vulnerable people in your city — the homeless, the incarcerated, the undocumented — are not in your church. This is not an accident. It is a failure of the church to reach across the boundaries that divide us.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Why the Prophets Were Expelled From the Sanctuary', 'prophets-expelled-sanctuary', 'The prophets were not welcomed in the temple. They were expelled because their message threatened the comfortable religious establishment. The prophet who is comfortable in the sanctuary is not a prophet. He is a chaplain to the status quo.', 'The prophets were not welcomed in the temple. They were expelled because their message threatened the comfortable religious establishment.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Exodus Demands of the Church Today', 'exodus-demands-church-today', 'The Exodus is not just ancient history. It is a paradigm for liberation that the church is called to embody today. God is on the side of the oppressed. The church that forgets this has forgotten its own story.', 'The Exodus is not just ancient history. It is a paradigm for liberation that the church is called to embody today. God is on the side of the oppressed.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Sabbath Is Resistance', 'sabbath-is-resistance', 'Sabbath is not just rest. It is a political act — a refusal to participate in the logic of endless production and consumption that fuels injustice. To keep Sabbath is to declare that there is more to life than work and that people matter more than productivity.', 'Sabbath is not just rest. It is a political act — a refusal to participate in the logic of endless production and consumption that fuels injustice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Pastoral Care of the Wealthy Congregant', 'pastoral-care-wealthy-congregant', 'The wealthy need pastoral care too. But that care must include prophetic challenge — a call to use their resources justly and to align their lives with the kingdom of God. Pastoral care that affirms the wealthy in their wealth is not care. It is complicity.', 'The wealthy need pastoral care too. But that care must include prophetic challenge — a call to use their resources justly and to align their lives with the kingdom of God.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why the Church''s Response to Poverty Has Been Mostly Charity', 'church-response-poverty-charity', 'The church has historically responded to poverty with charity rather than justice. This is not because charity is bad, but because it is insufficient. Charity addresses symptoms. Justice addresses causes. The church needs both, but it has prioritized charity.', 'The church has historically responded to poverty with charity rather than justice. This is not because charity is bad, but because it is insufficient.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('What Leviticus 19 Demands in a Border Crisis', 'leviticus-19-border-crisis', 'Leviticus 19 is clear: "Do not mistreat the foreigner. Love them as yourself, for you were foreigners in Egypt." This is not optional in times of crisis. The church''s response to immigration is a test of its faithfulness to Scripture.', 'Leviticus 19 is clear: "Do not mistreat the foreigner. Love them as yourself, for you were foreigners in Egypt." This is not optional in times of crisis.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Church''s Incarceration Silence', 'church-incarceration-silence', 'The church''s silence on mass incarceration is deafening. The carceral system disproportionately affects the poor and people of color. Justice demands a prophetic response. The church must speak for those who cannot speak for themselves.', 'The church''s silence on mass incarceration is deafening. The carceral system disproportionately affects the poor and people of color. Justice demands a prophetic response.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Why the Church Must Speak About Housing', 'church-must-speak-housing', 'Housing is not just an economic issue. It is a justice issue. The church must speak prophetically about the housing crisis and work for solutions. Everyone deserves safe, affordable housing. This is not negotiable.', 'Housing is not just an economic issue. It is a justice issue. The church must speak prophetically about the housing crisis and work for solutions.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('What We Owe the Ones Who Come After', 'what-we-owe-generations', 'We are accountable not just for our own generation but for those who come after us. Climate change, economic injustice, and systemic racism will be inherited by our children. Justice requires that we work to leave them a better world.', 'We are accountable not just for our own generation but for those who come after us. Climate change, economic injustice, and systemic racism will be inherited by our children.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Long Arc', 'the-long-arc', 'The arc of history is long, but it bends toward justice. The church is called to bend it. This is not naive optimism. It is faithful hope rooted in the God who is working toward redemption. The prophets knew this. So must we.', 'The arc of history is long, but it bends toward justice. The church is called to bend it. This is not naive optimism. It is faithful hope rooted in the God who is working toward redemption.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Greek Actually Says: Why Original Language Still Matters', 'greek-original-language-matters', 'The Bible was not written in English. This is an obvious statement that carries non-obvious implications. The English Bible that most Christians read is a translation — an extraordinarily valuable translation, in many cases a masterwork of linguistic and theological precision, but a translation nonetheless.', 'The Bible was not written in English. Every translation is a series of decisions about which range of meaning to bring forward and which to leave behind.', 'Theological Depth', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Church Fathers Were Not Boring: Why Early Christian Thinking Still Matters', 'church-fathers-not-boring', 'The church fathers — the theologians and bishops who shaped Christian doctrine in the first four centuries of the faith — are among the most vigorously misrepresented figures in the tradition. They were not writing systematic theology textbooks. They were fighting for the survival of a faith under enormous intellectual and political pressure.', 'The church fathers are among the most vigorously misrepresented figures in the tradition. They were fierce, creative, politically savvy, occasionally wrong, and almost always more interesting than the people who claim to be carrying on their legacy.', 'Theological Depth', '9 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Reformation Was Actually About (And What It Missed)', 'reformation-actually-about', 'The Protestant Reformation is one of the most significant events in Western history — religiously, culturally, politically, and economically. It is also one of the most simplified. The popular Protestant account tends to emphasize the recovery of grace alone, faith alone, Scripture alone, and the priesthood of all believers.', 'The Protestant Reformation is one of the most significant events in Western history. It is also one of the most simplified. The Reformation''s genuine recoveries came with genuine costs that the Reformers did not anticipate.', 'Theological Depth', '10 min', true, NOW()),
('Atonement: More Than One Model — Why the Cross Is Bigger Than Any Single Theory', 'atonement-more-than-one-model', 'The cross of Christ is the center of the Christian faith. Every tradition affirms this. But the question of what the cross actually accomplished — the theology of the atonement — is one of the areas where the Christian tradition has produced not one answer but several, and where the tendency to treat one model as the whole truth has consistently impoverished the church''s understanding.', 'The cross of Christ is the center of the Christian faith. But the question of what the cross actually accomplished is one area where the Christian tradition has produced not one answer but several.', 'Theological Depth', '10 min', true, NOW()),
('The Kingdom of God Is Not What You Think It Is', 'kingdom-of-god-not-what-you-think', 'The kingdom of God is not primarily a future reality. It is a present reality that has broken into history in Jesus and is working toward its consummation. Understanding this changes everything about how we live and what we work toward.', 'The kingdom of God is not primarily a future reality. It is a present reality that has broken into history in Jesus and is working toward its consummation.', 'Theological Depth', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Psalms as Prayer — Not Just Poetry', 'psalms-as-prayer-not-poetry', 'The Psalms are not just beautiful poetry. They are prayers — the prayers of the people of God across centuries. They teach us how to pray honestly, including prayers of anger, doubt, and lament that the church often tries to suppress.', 'The Psalms are not just beautiful poetry. They are prayers — the prayers of the people of God across centuries. They teach us how to pray honestly.', 'Theological Depth', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Holy Spirit Is Not a Feeling', 'holy-spirit-not-feeling', 'The Holy Spirit is often reduced to an emotional experience. But the Spirit is the active presence and power of God in the world, working to transform and redeem. The Spirit is not primarily about how we feel. The Spirit is about what God is doing.', 'The Holy Spirit is often reduced to an emotional experience. But the Spirit is the active presence and power of God in the world, working to transform and redeem.', 'Theological Depth', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Sin Is Not Just What You Do — It''s What You Are', 'sin-not-just-what-you-do', 'Sin is not primarily a list of bad actions. Sin is a condition — a fundamental brokenness in our relationship with God that shapes everything we do. Understanding this changes how we understand salvation and transformation.', 'Sin is not primarily a list of bad actions. Sin is a condition — a fundamental brokenness in our relationship with God that shapes everything we do.', 'Theological Depth', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Eschatology Matters — Why the End Shapes How We Live Now', 'eschatology-matters-end-shapes-now', 'What you believe about the end of history shapes how you live now. Eschatology is not just about the future. It is about the present. The church that believes God is working toward redemption lives differently than the church that believes history is meaningless.', 'What you believe about the end of history shapes how you live now. Eschatology is not just about the future. It is about the present.', 'Theological Depth', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Incarnation Changes Everything — Why God Became Human', 'incarnation-changes-everything', 'The incarnation is not just a means to an end. It is the center of Christian theology. God became human to show us what it means to be fully human and fully alive. This changes everything about how we understand the body, the material world, and human flourishing.', 'The incarnation is not just a means to an end. It is the center of Christian theology. God became human to show us what it means to be fully human and fully alive.', 'Theological Depth', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('When the Shepherd Needs Shepherding', 'when-shepherd-needs-shepherding', 'You were never designed to carry the weight of ministry alone — and the Gospel you preach proves it. You know how to shepherd. You''ve sat with people in hospital rooms at midnight. But let me ask you something: Who shepherds you? Most pastors I talk to go silent when I ask that question.', 'You know how to shepherd. But who shepherds you? Most pastors go silent when asked that question. No one is really walking with them. That''s a crisis.', 'Integrated Life', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Burnout Nobody Talks About', 'burnout-nobody-talks-about', 'Pastoral burnout is real. And it''s more common than we admit. But it often doesn''t look the way we expect. We think burnout means the pastor who quits, the one who has the public collapse, the one everyone hears about. But most pastoral burnout is quieter than that.', 'Pastoral burnout doesn''t always look like collapse. Sometimes it looks like just showing up. The slow erosion of joy. The gradual detachment from the things you once loved.', 'Integrated Life', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Sabbath Isn''t Optional', 'sabbath-isnt-optional', 'Let''s talk about the day off you''re not taking. I know, I know. Ministry doesn''t follow a schedule. People have crises on Fridays. The sermon doesn''t write itself. But here''s the truth: there will always be something. That''s not a reason to skip your Sabbath.', 'If God rested, you don''t get to use your busyness as an excuse not to. Sabbath is not a reward for the productive. It is a rhythm. A design principle. A theological statement.', 'Integrated Life', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Your Marriage Is a Ministry Too', 'your-marriage-is-ministry-too', 'There is a quiet tragedy playing out in too many pastor''s homes. The congregation is growing. The ministry is bearing fruit. The pastor is present, attentive, warm, engaged — at church. At home, he''s distracted. Exhausted. Always about to have time, never quite having it.', 'Neglecting your spouse in the name of ministry is not sacrifice. It''s subtraction. Your spouse did not sign up to be second place.', 'Integrated Life', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Weight of What You Can''t Say', 'weight-of-what-you-cant-say', 'You know things about your congregation that nobody else knows. You know whose marriage is barely hanging on. You know who the addict is. You carry the private confessions, the hidden fears, the secrets that people have trusted you — and only you — with. And you can''t tell anyone.', 'You know things about your congregation that nobody else knows. You carry confidences you can''t share. The accumulation of held confidences is one of the most underestimated forms of pastoral stress.', 'Integrated Life', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Finding Your Barnabas', 'finding-your-barnabas', 'Every pastor needs a Barnabas — someone who believes in you, walks with you, and helps you become who you''re called to be. Finding that person is one of the most important things you can do for your own spiritual health and ministry effectiveness.', 'Every pastor needs a Barnabas — someone who believes in you, walks with you, and helps you become who you''re called to be. Finding that person is one of the most important things you can do.', 'Leadership Formation', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Loneliness of Leadership', 'loneliness-of-leadership', 'Leadership is isolating. The decisions you make affect people. The confidences you keep separate you from community. The weight of responsibility can be crushing. But you don''t have to carry it alone. Finding people who understand the unique challenges of pastoral leadership is essential.', 'Leadership is isolating. The decisions you make affect people. The confidences you keep separate you from community. The weight of responsibility can be crushing. But you don''t have to carry it alone.', 'Leadership Formation', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Delegation Is Not Weakness', 'delegation-is-not-weakness', 'Many pastors struggle with delegation. They think it means they''re not doing their job. But delegation is actually a sign of strength and wisdom. The pastor who tries to do everything is not being faithful. He''s being foolish.', 'Many pastors struggle with delegation. They think it means they''re not doing their job. But delegation is actually a sign of strength and wisdom.', 'Leadership Formation', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Vision Without Community Is Just Fantasy', 'vision-without-community-fantasy', 'A pastor''s vision for the church means nothing if the community doesn''t own it. Building shared vision is one of the most important leadership tasks. The pastor who imposes vision from above will eventually face resistance. The pastor who builds vision with the community creates movement.', 'A pastor''s vision for the church means nothing if the community doesn''t own it. Building shared vision is one of the most important leadership tasks.', 'Leadership Formation', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Pastor''s Authority Is Relational', 'pastors-authority-relational', 'Pastoral authority is not positional. It is relational. It is earned through trust, consistency, and genuine care for the people you lead. The pastor who relies on position rather than relationship will eventually lose the ability to lead.', 'Pastoral authority is not positional. It is relational. It is earned through trust, consistency, and genuine care for the people you lead.', 'Leadership Formation', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Conflict Is Not Failure', 'conflict-is-not-failure', 'Many pastors see conflict as a sign that they''ve failed as leaders. But conflict is inevitable in any community. The question is how you handle it. The pastor who addresses conflict directly and biblically is actually leading well.', 'Many pastors see conflict as a sign that they''ve failed as leaders. But conflict is inevitable in any community. The question is how you handle it.', 'Leadership Formation', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Building a Leadership Team', 'building-leadership-team', 'You cannot lead a church alone. Building a strong leadership team is essential for the health and growth of the congregation. The pastor who tries to be the only leader will eventually burn out and the church will suffer.', 'You cannot lead a church alone. Building a strong leadership team is essential for the health and growth of the congregation.', 'Leadership Formation', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Danger of Pastoral Isolation', 'danger-pastoral-isolation', 'Pastoral isolation is one of the biggest threats to pastoral health and ministry effectiveness. Isolation leads to poor decisions, spiritual decline, and burnout. The pastor who isolates himself from community and accountability is heading toward crisis.', 'Pastoral isolation is one of the biggest threats to pastoral health and ministry effectiveness. Isolation leads to poor decisions, spiritual decline, and burnout.', 'Leadership Formation', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Unity Without Uniformity', 'unity-without-uniformity', 'The church is called to unity, but not uniformity. Genuine unity celebrates diversity and holds strong convictions while remaining connected across differences. The church that demands uniformity will eventually fracture. The church that pursues genuine unity will grow stronger.', 'The church is called to unity, but not uniformity. Genuine unity celebrates diversity and holds strong convictions while remaining connected across differences.', 'Prophetic Disruption', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Courage to Be Different', 'courage-to-be-different', 'The church is called to be different from the world. This requires courage — the willingness to stand apart and speak truth even when it''s unpopular. The pastor who is afraid to be different will lead a church that is indistinguishable from the world.', 'The church is called to be different from the world. This requires courage — the willingness to stand apart and speak truth even when it''s unpopular.', 'Prophetic Disruption', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Collaboration Across Denominations', 'collaboration-across-denominations', 'The church is divided by denominations, but we are united in Christ. Collaboration across denominational lines strengthens the witness of the church and expands its reach. The pastor who isolates his church from other churches is impoverishing the body of Christ.', 'The church is divided by denominations, but we are united in Christ. Collaboration across denominational lines strengthens the witness of the church and expands its reach.', 'Prophetic Disruption', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Global Church Is Your Church', 'global-church-is-your-church', 'The global church is not somewhere else. It is your church. You are connected to believers in every nation, and they are connected to you. Understanding this changes how you pray, give, and engage with the world.', 'The global church is not somewhere else. It is your church. You are connected to believers in every nation, and they are connected to you.', 'Prophetic Disruption', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Mission Is Not Optional', 'mission-is-not-optional', 'Mission is not a program. It is the heartbeat of the church. Every church is called to participate in God''s mission in the world. The church that loses sight of mission loses sight of its reason for existence.', 'Mission is not a program. It is the heartbeat of the church. Every church is called to participate in God''s mission in the world.', 'Prophetic Disruption', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Your City Is Your Mission Field', 'your-city-is-mission-field', 'Many churches look to distant mission fields while neglecting the people right in front of them. Your city is your mission field. Start there. The people in your neighborhood are just as lost and just as valuable as people on the other side of the world.', 'Many churches look to distant mission fields while neglecting the people right in front of them. Your city is your mission field. Start there.', 'Prophetic Disruption', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Church''s Response to Culture', 'church-response-to-culture', 'The church is called to engage culture, not to hide from it or to be consumed by it. This requires wisdom, discernment, and courage. The pastor who can help his church navigate cultural change will lead a church that is relevant without compromising its convictions.', 'The church is called to engage culture, not to hide from it or to be consumed by it. This requires wisdom, discernment, and courage.', 'Prophetic Disruption', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Truth in a Post-Truth World', 'truth-in-post-truth-world', 'We live in a world where truth is increasingly contested. The church must be a voice for truth — not arrogantly, but humbly and prophetically. The pastor who equivocates on truth will lead a church that has nothing to say to the world.', 'We live in a world where truth is increasingly contested. The church must be a voice for truth — not arrogantly, but humbly and prophetically.', 'Prophetic Disruption', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Interior Life of the Pastor', 'interior-life-of-pastor', 'Your interior life as a pastor is not separate from your ministry. It shapes everything you do and say. The health of your soul is the health of your ministry. The pastor who neglects his own spiritual formation will eventually have nothing to offer his congregation.', 'Your interior life as a pastor is not separate from your ministry. It shapes everything you do and say. The health of your soul is the health of your ministry.', 'Integrated Life', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Prayer Is Not Optional', 'prayer-is-not-optional', 'Prayer is not something you do when you have time. Prayer is the foundation of everything you do. Without it, your ministry is just human effort. The pastor who does not pray is not leading. He is just managing.', 'Prayer is not something you do when you have time. Prayer is the foundation of everything you do. Without it, your ministry is just human effort.', 'Integrated Life', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Scripture Meditation', 'scripture-meditation', 'Meditating on Scripture is not just a spiritual practice. It is essential for pastoral health and ministry effectiveness. It shapes how you think and what you believe. The pastor who does not meditate on Scripture will eventually lose his way.', 'Meditating on Scripture is not just a spiritual practice. It is essential for pastoral health and ministry effectiveness. It shapes how you think and what you believe.', 'Integrated Life', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Spiritual Disciplines for Pastors', 'spiritual-disciplines-for-pastors', 'Spiritual disciplines are not luxuries. They are necessities for pastoral health. Without them, you will eventually burn out and lose your way. The pastor who practices spiritual disciplines will be healthier, more effective, and more joyful in ministry.', 'Spiritual disciplines are not luxuries. They are necessities for pastoral health. Without them, you will eventually burn out and lose your way.', 'Integrated Life', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Examined Life', 'the-examined-life', 'The unexamined life is not worth living, and the unexamined ministry is not worth leading. Regular reflection on your life and ministry is essential. The pastor who takes time to examine his life will grow in wisdom and effectiveness.', 'The unexamined life is not worth living, and the unexamined ministry is not worth leading. Regular reflection on your life and ministry is essential.', 'Integrated Life', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Repentance and Renewal', 'repentance-and-renewal', 'Repentance is not just for sinners. It is for pastors too. The willingness to acknowledge failure and turn around is essential for growth and renewal. The pastor who repents will lead a church that repents.', 'Repentance is not just for sinners. It is for pastors too. The willingness to acknowledge failure and turn around is essential for growth and renewal.', 'Integrated Life', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Hope of Resurrection', 'hope-of-resurrection', 'The resurrection is not just a historical event. It is the foundation of Christian hope. The pastor who truly believes in the resurrection will lead differently. He will have hope in the midst of despair and will call his congregation to the same hope.', 'The resurrection is not just a historical event. It is the foundation of Christian hope. The pastor who truly believes in the resurrection will lead differently.', 'Integrated Life', '8 min', true, NOW());

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2R8Hw4VBpxrrDge.root --database KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG --execute INSERT INTO posts (title, slug, body, excerpt, pillar, readTime, published, createdAt) VALUES
('Where the Church Was Silent: A Reckoning With the History We Would Rather Not Own', 'where-church-was-silent', 'The church in America has a history that is not primarily the history of courage and faithfulness, though it contains that. It is, in significant stretches, a history of silence in the face of injustice — a silence that was often theological, often institutional, and almost always served the interests of the church''s own comfort and cultural position more than the interests of the people the silence abandoned.', 'The church in America has a history that is not primarily the history of courage and faithfulness. It is, in significant stretches, a history of silence in the face of injustice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Justice Is Not a Political Category: It Is a Theological One', 'justice-not-political-theological', 'Somewhere in the last several decades of American church life, a strange inversion occurred. The word "justice" — which appears hundreds of times in the Hebrew Bible, which is the specific word used to describe one of God''s most essential attributes, which the prophets announced and which Jesus inaugurated as the content of the kingdom — came to be heard in many evangelical contexts as a political term.', 'The word "justice" — which appears hundreds of times in the Hebrew Bible — came to be heard in many evangelical contexts as a political term. This inversion is theological error of the most significant kind.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Complicity Is Not Innocence: What Silence Costs the Witness', 'complicity-not-innocence', 'The comfortable Christian position in a culture with genuine injustice is neither endorsement nor active resistance. It is something more subtle and more convenient: the claim of non-involvement, the insistence that the church is above the political fray, the cultivation of a carefully maintained neutrality.', 'Silence in the face of injustice is not neutrality. It is a choice — and a choice with consequences that fall primarily on the people the injustice is targeting.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Poor Are Not a Ministry Category — They Are the Test of the Church', 'poor-not-ministry-category', 'The biblical position on the poor is not ambiguous. It is among the most consistently stated, most emphatically repeated, most specifically applied themes in the entire canon of Scripture — from the Mosaic law''s protections for the poor, the widow, the orphan, and the stranger.', 'The biblical position on the poor is not ambiguous. It is among the most consistently stated, most emphatically repeated themes in the entire canon of Scripture.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Creation Care Is Not Optional', 'creation-care-not-optional', 'The stewardship of creation is not an optional add-on to the gospel. It is central to what it means to bear the image of God and to participate in God''s redemptive work in the world. The earth is the Lord''s, and we are accountable for how we treat it.', 'The stewardship of creation is not an optional add-on to the gospel. It is central to what it means to bear the image of God and to participate in God''s redemptive work.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Widow, the Orphan, the Stranger', 'widow-orphan-stranger', 'These three figures appear together repeatedly in Scripture as the specific focus of God''s concern and the measure of the community''s faithfulness. They represent the vulnerable, the powerless, those without advocate or protection in the social order.', 'These three figures appear together repeatedly in Scripture as the specific focus of God''s concern and the measure of the community''s faithfulness.', 'Prophetic Justice', '5 min', true, NOW()),
('Mishpat and Tsedaqah', 'mishpat-tsedaqah', 'Two Hebrew words capture the fullness of biblical justice: mishpat (the establishment of right order) and tsedaqah (the restoration of right relationships). Together they describe the comprehensive vision of justice that runs through the prophetic tradition.', 'Two Hebrew words capture the fullness of biblical justice: mishpat (the establishment of right order) and tsedaqah (the restoration of right relationships).', 'Prophetic Justice', '5 min', true, NOW()),
('What Micah 6:8 Actually Demands', 'micah-6-8-demands', 'This verse is the distilled summary of what God requires. Not religious performance. Not institutional success. Not comfort or safety. Justice, mercy, and humility — lived out in the actual world with actual people.', '"He has shown you, O mortal, what is good. And what does the LORD require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God."', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Church Has a Credibility Problem', 'church-credibility-problem', 'The witness that survives is the witness willing to speak when speaking is costly. Everything else is brand management. The church known, among the people it claims to care about, for its silence when they needed its voice has sacrificed something very difficult to recover.', 'The church''s silence on justice has cost it something very difficult to recover: the credibility that comes from being genuinely trustworthy in the moments that matter.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Racial Reconciliation Without Repentance Is Just Branding', 'racial-reconciliation-without-repentance', 'Genuine reconciliation requires more than acknowledgment. It requires repentance — a turning away from the systems and patterns that created the injustice in the first place. Without that, reconciliation language becomes a marketing strategy rather than a theological reality.', 'Genuine reconciliation requires more than acknowledgment. It requires repentance — a turning away from the systems and patterns that created the injustice in the first place.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Prophetic Tradition on Economic Justice', 'prophetic-tradition-economic-justice', 'The prophets of Israel were not primarily social activists. They were messengers of God who announced, with extraordinary specificity, what God thought about the economic arrangements of the society. Their indictments of the wealthy and their advocacy for the poor are not peripheral to their message.', 'The prophets of Israel were not primarily social activists. They were messengers of God who announced, with extraordinary specificity, what God thought about the economic arrangements of the society.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Jubilee Means', 'what-jubilee-means', 'The Jubilee was God''s economic reset button — a radical vision of economic justice built into the law of Israel. Every fifty years, debts were forgiven, slaves were freed, and land was returned to its original owners. It was a theological statement about the limits of accumulation and the priority of liberation.', 'The Jubilee was God''s economic reset button — a radical vision of economic justice built into the law of Israel.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Stranger at the Gate', 'stranger-at-gate', 'The stranger appears in Scripture as a figure of particular concern — someone to be protected, provided for, and included in the community''s life. The law repeatedly commands: "Do not mistreat the stranger, for you were strangers in Egypt."', 'The stranger appears in Scripture as a figure of particular concern — someone to be protected, provided for, and included in the community''s life.', 'Prophetic Justice', '5 min', true, NOW()),
('Individual Sin Is Real — But So Is Systemic Sin', 'individual-sin-systemic-sin', 'The church often emphasizes personal morality while remaining blind to the systems that perpetuate injustice. Both are real, and both require attention. A person can be individually moral while participating in systems that are structurally unjust.', 'The church often emphasizes personal morality while remaining blind to the systems that perpetuate injustice. Both are real, and both require attention.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Poverty Is Political', 'why-poverty-political', 'Poverty is not primarily a personal failure. It is the result of political and economic systems that concentrate wealth and power in the hands of the few. Addressing it requires not just charity but justice — changes to the systems themselves.', 'Poverty is not primarily a personal failure. It is the result of political and economic systems that concentrate wealth and power in the hands of the few.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Church''s Wealth and the World''s Poverty', 'church-wealth-world-poverty', 'The contrast between the church''s resources and the world''s poverty is one of the most pressing ethical questions facing contemporary Christianity. How the church uses its wealth is a theological statement about what it believes and what it values.', 'The contrast between the church''s resources and the world''s poverty is one of the most pressing ethical questions facing contemporary Christianity.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Payday Lending Should Keep Christians Up at Night', 'payday-lending-christians', 'Payday lending is a system designed to extract wealth from the poor. The church''s silence on it is complicity with injustice. Interest rates that exceed 300% annually are not accidents. They are features of a system that preys on vulnerability.', 'Payday lending is a system designed to extract wealth from the poor. The church''s silence on it is complicity with injustice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Silence About Abuse in the Church', 'silence-abuse-church', 'The church''s institutional protection of abusers and silencing of victims is one of its most serious failures and most urgent moral crises. Justice requires not just individual accountability but systemic change in how the church handles power and protects the vulnerable.', 'The church''s institutional protection of abusers and silencing of victims is one of its most serious failures and most urgent moral crises.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Imago Dei Means More Than You Think', 'imago-dei-means-more', 'The image of God is not a spiritual abstraction. It is the foundation for human dignity and the basis for justice. Every person bears the image of God, and that image cannot be diminished by poverty, disability, race, or any other category.', 'The image of God is not a spiritual abstraction. It is the foundation for human dignity and the basis for justice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Good Samaritan Is Actually Arguing', 'good-samaritan-arguing', 'The parable of the Good Samaritan is not primarily about individual charity. It is a radical statement about who belongs to the community and who we are obligated to care for. It challenges the boundaries we draw and the people we exclude.', 'The parable of the Good Samaritan is not primarily about individual charity. It is a radical statement about who belongs to the community and who we are obligated to care for.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Solidarity Is a Theological Virtue', 'solidarity-theological-virtue', 'Solidarity is not just a political stance. It is a theological commitment to stand with the vulnerable and to work for their liberation. It is rooted in the God who stands with the oppressed and calls the church to do the same.', 'Solidarity is not just a political stance. It is a theological commitment to stand with the vulnerable and to work for their liberation.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('The Most Prophetic Thing You Can Do Is Live Differently', 'most-prophetic-live-differently', 'Prophetic witness is not primarily about words. It is about living in a way that demonstrates an alternative vision of what is possible. The way you spend your money, how you treat people, where you live, who you associate with — these are prophetic statements.', 'Prophetic witness is not primarily about words. It is about living in a way that demonstrates an alternative vision of what is possible.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Children in Poverty Are a Prophetic Indictment', 'children-poverty-prophetic-indictment', 'A society''s treatment of its poorest children is a measure of its moral character. The church that allows children to suffer in poverty has abandoned its prophetic calling. Jesus was explicit: "Let the little children come to me."', 'A society''s treatment of its poorest children is a measure of its moral character. The church that allows children to suffer in poverty has abandoned its prophetic calling.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Addressing Symptoms Without Causes Is Charity, Not Justice', 'symptoms-without-causes-charity', 'Charity addresses the immediate need. Justice addresses the system that created the need. Both are necessary, but only justice is transformative. The church that only practices charity while ignoring injustice is complicit with the systems that perpetuate suffering.', 'Charity addresses the immediate need. Justice addresses the system that created the need. Both are necessary, but only justice is transformative.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('The Church and Mental Health Justice', 'church-mental-health-justice', 'Mental health is not a personal failing. It is deeply connected to economic stress, trauma, and social conditions. Justice requires addressing these root causes. The church''s role is not just to pray for the mentally ill but to work for the conditions that promote mental health.', 'Mental health is not a personal failing. It is deeply connected to economic stress, trauma, and social conditions. Justice requires addressing these root causes.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('Church Megaproject Budgets and the Widow''s Mite', 'church-megaproject-widows-mite', 'The contrast between massive church building projects and the widow''s sacrificial giving raises hard questions about what the church values and what it communicates about priorities. Jesus praised the widow''s mite precisely because it represented genuine sacrifice. What does our spending represent?', 'The contrast between massive church building projects and the widow''s sacrificial giving raises hard questions about what the church values and what it communicates about priorities.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('What Predominantly White Churches Get Wrong About Diversity', 'white-churches-diversity', 'Diversity is not a program to add to the church. It is a fundamental reorientation of how the church understands itself and its mission. Many white churches treat diversity as a problem to solve rather than a gift to receive and a justice imperative to embrace.', 'Diversity is not a program to add to the church. It is a fundamental reorientation of how the church understands itself and its mission.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Why "Reaching the Rich" Has Always Been More Comfortable', 'reaching-rich-comfortable', 'The church has historically prioritized reaching the wealthy because they have resources, power, and social standing. But Jesus prioritized the poor. This is not a minor difference. It shapes everything about what the church does and who it serves.', 'The church has historically prioritized reaching the wealthy because they have resources, power, and social standing. But Jesus prioritized the poor.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Theology of Repair', 'theology-of-repair', 'Justice is not just about stopping injustice. It is about repairing the damage that injustice has caused. This requires a theology of repair — a commitment to making things right, to restoration, to healing the wounds that injustice has inflicted.', 'Justice is not just about stopping injustice. It is about repairing the damage that injustice has caused. This requires a theology of repair.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('Hospitality Is Not Optional', 'hospitality-not-optional', 'Hospitality is a central biblical value and a practice of justice. It is the way we welcome the stranger and include the excluded. The church that practices genuine hospitality is making a prophetic statement about who belongs and who matters.', 'Hospitality is a central biblical value and a practice of justice. It is the way we welcome the stranger and include the excluded.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('Disability Justice Is a Theological Issue', 'disability-justice-theological', 'The inclusion and full participation of people with disabilities is not a program. It is a theological imperative rooted in the image of God. The church that excludes people with disabilities is denying the full humanity of those who bear God''s image.', 'The inclusion and full participation of people with disabilities is not a program. It is a theological imperative rooted in the image of God.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Earth Is the Lord''s', 'earth-is-lords', 'Creation care is not an optional concern for environmentalists. It is central to Christian theology and practice. The earth belongs to God, and we are accountable for how we treat it. Climate change is a justice issue because it disproportionately affects the poor.', 'Creation care is not an optional concern for environmentalists. It is central to Christian theology and practice. The earth belongs to God, and we are accountable for how we treat it.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Book of Ruth Says About Gleaning Laws', 'ruth-gleaning-laws', 'The gleaning laws of Israel were not charity. They were justice — a way of ensuring that the poor had access to the resources they needed to survive. The book of Ruth shows what this looks like in practice.', 'The gleaning laws of Israel were not charity. They were justice — a way of ensuring that the poor had access to the resources they needed to survive.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('Why the Church''s Comfort With Inequality Requires Explanation', 'church-comfort-inequality', 'The church''s acceptance of vast economic inequality is not neutral. It is a theological choice with theological consequences. It requires theological justification, and that justification is hard to find in Scripture.', 'The church''s acceptance of vast economic inequality is not neutral. It is a theological choice with theological consequences. It requires theological justification, and that justification is hard to find in Scripture.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Prophetic Pastor', 'prophetic-pastor', 'The pastor is called to be a prophetic voice — to name injustice, to challenge the powerful, to advocate for the vulnerable. This is not optional. It is central to the pastoral calling. The pastor who remains silent is not being neutral. He is complicit.', 'The pastor is called to be a prophetic voice — to name injustice, to challenge the powerful, to advocate for the vulnerable. This is not optional.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Justice Without Love Is Ideology', 'justice-without-love-ideology', 'Justice pursued without love becomes ideology. Love pursued without justice becomes sentimentality. The church needs both. The prophets combined fierce indictments of injustice with deep compassion for the vulnerable.', 'Justice pursued without love becomes ideology. Love pursued without justice becomes sentimentality. The church needs both.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', true, NOW()),
('What the Beatitudes Are Actually Promising', 'beatitudes-actually-promising', 'The Beatitudes are not spiritual abstractions. They are political statements about God''s preference for the poor and God''s vision of a transformed world. "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven."', 'The Beatitudes are not spiritual abstractions. They are political statements about God''s preference for the poor and God''s vision of a transformed world.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Black Church Has Been Doing Prophetic Justice for Centuries', 'black-church-prophetic-justice', 'The Black church has been a prophetic voice for justice in America for centuries. The white church has much to learn from this witness. The prophetic tradition is not an innovation. It is a recovery of something the Black church has always known.', 'The Black church has been a prophetic voice for justice in America for centuries. The white church has much to learn from this witness.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', true, NOW()),
('Why Color-Blindness Is Not a Theological Virtue', 'color-blindness-not-virtue', 'Color-blindness sounds virtuous but it is actually a way of denying the reality of racism and its ongoing effects. Justice requires seeing and naming racial injustice. The church that claims to be color-blind is blind to the suffering of people of color.', 'Color-blindness sounds virtuous but it is actually a way of denying the reality of racism and its ongoing effects. Justice requires seeing and naming racial injustice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', true, NOW()),
('The Most Vulnerable People in Your City Are Not in Your Pews', 'vulnerable-people-not-in-pews', 'The most vulnerable people in your city — the homeless, the incarcerated, the undocumented — are not in your church. This is not an accident. It is a failure of the church to reach across the boundaries that divide us.
